The main subject is an orange tabby kitten with darker stripes, greenish eyes, and a slightly drooped, downward-looking gaze. Its head and upper body fill most of the frame, and it appears to be resting on a soft, light background.

The setting appears to be indoors, with a pale fabric or blanket-like surface behind and under the kitten. The lighting is even and soft, and the camera angle is close and slightly above the kitten’s face, creating a centered composition.

Visual details include the kitten’s orange and brown fur with distinct tabby markings and a small white area around the mouth and chin. Along the bottom of the image, three circular orange emoji-style icons each show a sad face with downturned brows and a small frown; the left icon also shows two small vertical marks near the center, while the three icons are evenly spaced and aligned horizontally.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows a resting orange tabby kitten with three sad face icons displayed in the foreground along the bottom. The overall look is a close, centered snapshot with soft indoor lighting and a light background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
